creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'd like to take adime as another one of my ports if possible.
--- Makefile.old	2009-02-27 21:24:34.000000000 +0000
+++ Makefile	2009-08-09 15:20:33.000000000 +0000
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	EitanAdlerList@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Generate Allegro dialogs in a very simple way
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	alleg.42:${PORTSDIR}/devel/allegro
